title: Timur Turlov: The Future of the Market and How Entrepreneurs Can Stay One Step Ahead
sentences: Timur Turlov: The Future of the Market and How Entrepreneurs Can Stay One Step Ahead Timur Turlov, CEO of Freedom Holding Corp., shares his insights on navigating the future market as an entrepreneur.
He emphasizes adaptability, investing in technology and AI, viewing money as a tool, building trust over marketing, self-education, and balancing family and business.
Turlov's company has seen significant growth, achieving $655.2 million in revenue and a market capitalization exceeding $9.5 billion.
